claim_boundary: Post-hoc box-resize sweep on 74-row public-raster overlay subset. Runtime transform uses predicted bbox/label/score and fixed config only; gold targets are evaluation-only.

recommendation.reason: official materialized P101 eval improves both precision and recall over P155E with no inflation increase.
recommendation.next: Continue with P158 label-conditioned calibration or P159 support-aware merge; P157 did not solve tiny recall enough, so do not freeze yet.
